hooks.command: input=$(cat); if [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; mode=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.permission_mode'); if [ "$mode" != "acceptEdits" ] && [ "$mode" != "auto" ]; then exit 0; fi; script="$(jj workspace root)/stop-hook.sh"; if [ ! -x "$script" ]; then exit 0; fi; output=$("$script" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s\n' "$output" >&2; echo 'Please fix the issues above' >&2; exit 2; fi
